home.heroSubtitle: Attendance tracking, leave management, payroll processing, and team oversight — all in one platform built for modern workplaces.
home.featuresSubtitle: A complete HR toolkit designed for distributed teams across multiple regions.

feature.attendanceDesc: Real-time clock in/out with break tracking, overtime calculations, and monthly hour summaries.
feature.leaveDesc: Paid, unpaid, and region-specific leave types with approval workflows and balance tracking.
feature.payrollDesc: Detailed salary breakdowns, multi-currency support, and daily work reports with version history.
feature.teamDesc: Manager dashboards with real-time team status, approval queues, and team calendars.
feature.policyDesc: Configurable policies for hours, leave, overtime, compensation, and probation by employment group.
feature.regionDesc: Support for multiple regions with local holidays, currencies, and employment regulations.

home.deploySubtitle: Choose the setup that fits your organization.
home.deploySaasDesc: For growing teams. Zero infrastructure, automatic updates, enterprise-grade security.
home.deploySelfHostedDesc: Full control. Deploy on your own AWS infrastructure with complete data ownership.

auth.selectEmployee: Select an employee to log in as
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your account to continue

attendance.lockedNotice: This period is locked by admin. Editing is disabled.

leave.zeroBalanceWarning: Your paid leave balance is zero. Consider unpaid leave or shift permission.

reports.placeholder: What did you work on today?
reports.todayPlaceholder: What will you work on today?

admin.locksDesc: Lock attendance periods to prevent modifications

offboard.settlementNote: Final settlement will be calculated based on pro-rata salary, unused leave, and pending deductions.

policy.noData: No policy data for this domain. Click Edit to add fields.
policy.deprecatedHint: This policy is no longer actively maintained but remains applied to historical periods.

fieldDesc.dailyMinimum: Minimum required work hours per day. Shortfalls trigger daily flags.
fieldDesc.weeklyMinimum: Minimum required work hours per week. Used for weekly deficit checks.
fieldDesc.monthlyMinimum: Minimum required work hours per month. Drives payroll and overtime calculations.
fieldDesc.workArrangement: Work location: OFFICE, REMOTE, or HYBRID. Affects clock-in validation.
fieldDesc.timeType: Schedule type: FIXED (core hours enforced), FLEX (any time), SHIFT (rotation-based).
fieldDesc.coreHoursStart: Start of mandatory presence window (e.g. 10:00). Only applies when timeType is FIXED.
fieldDesc.coreHoursEnd: End of mandatory presence window (e.g. 15:00). Only applies when timeType is FIXED.
fieldDesc.accrualSchedule: Array of {months, days} defining when paid leave is granted based on tenure.
fieldDesc.startConditionMonths: Months of employment before leave accrual begins.
fieldDesc.annualCap: Maximum paid leave days that can be accrued per year.
fieldDesc.carryOverMonths: Number of months unused leave can carry into the next period.
fieldDesc.leaveTypes: Array of leave type codes available to this group (e.g. PAID, SICK, UNPAID).
fieldDesc.mandatoryUsageDays: Minimum days of leave the employee must use per year.
fieldDesc.terminationHandling: How unused leave is handled on termination: FORFEIT or PAYOUT.
fieldDesc.deemedHours: Maximum overtime hours included in base salary (deemed overtime / minashi zangyou).
fieldDesc.standard: Overtime rate multiplier for regular overtime (e.g. 1.25 = 125%).
fieldDesc.holiday: Overtime rate for work on holidays.
fieldDesc.excess60h: Overtime rate for hours exceeding 60h/month (Japanese labor law 1.5x).
fieldDesc.monthlyLimit: Maximum overtime hours allowed per month before triggering alerts.
fieldDesc.yearlyLimit: Maximum overtime hours allowed per year (regulatory limit).
fieldDesc.salaryType: Base compensation type: MONTHLY, ANNUAL, or HOURLY.
fieldDesc.allowanceTypes: Array of allowance type codes (e.g. TRANSPORT, HOUSING, REMOTE).
fieldDesc.commissionTracking: Whether commission earnings are tracked for this group.
fieldDesc.durationMonths: Length of probation period in months.
fieldDesc.leaveAllowed: Whether paid leave accrual is allowed during probation.
fieldDesc.noticePeriodDays: Notice period required during probation (shorter than standard).
fieldDesc.dailyThreshold: Whether daily hour shortfall flags are enabled.
fieldDesc.weeklyThreshold: Whether weekly hour shortfall flags are enabled.
fieldDesc.monthlyThreshold: Whether monthly hour shortfall flags are enabled.
fieldDesc.gracePeriodMinutes: Minutes of tolerance before a shortfall is flagged.
fieldDesc.deadlineDay: Day of month when salary payment is due.
fieldDesc.alertDaysBefore: Days before payment deadline to send reminder alerts.
fieldDesc.settlementDeadlineDay: Day of month by which final settlements must be completed.
fieldDesc.submissionDeadline: Time by which daily reports must be submitted (e.g. 18:00).
fieldDesc.reminderTime: Time at which report submission reminders are sent.
fieldDesc.title: Custom title shown on salary statement PDF.
fieldDesc.footer: Footer text on salary statement PDF.
fieldDesc.greeting: Greeting line on salary statement PDF.
fieldDesc.headerBgColor: Background color of salary statement header.
fieldDesc.headerTextColor: Text color of salary statement header.
fieldDesc.accentColor: Accent color used in salary statement.
fieldDesc.showOvertimePay: Whether overtime pay line is shown on salary statement.
fieldDesc.showAllowances: Whether allowance breakdown is shown on salary statement.
fieldDesc.showBonus: Whether bonus line is shown on salary statement.
fieldDesc.showCommission: Whether commission line is shown on salary statement.
fieldDesc.showDeficitDeduction: Whether deficit deduction is shown on salary statement.
fieldDesc.showTransferFees: Whether transfer fees are shown on salary statement.
fieldDesc.showExchangeRate: Whether exchange rate is shown on salary statement.

settings.profileDesc: Profile information loaded from your account
settings.name: Name

documents.invalidType: Only PDF and image files are accepted

probation.expiringAlert: Probation ending in {{days}} days — schedule performance review

quota.acknowledgeReduction: I acknowledge this reduction in total hours
